channel.title: Windfall Tax on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Windfall Tax on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently - Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Ramesh is absolutely certain the fuel situation is managed, the Ambassador made a fair point, and the park's new name is culturally significant.

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief – Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Fuel lines, a dead Nicaraguan pilot, a detective under arrest, oil diplomacy, and a war that is somehow Guyana's problem now. Tuesday's brief.

item.title: Progress Report & Rumour Mill — March 2026
item.description: Tracking the nation's promises, projects, and entirely fictional rumours.

item.title: Wednesday Brief: Oil Hits $100, Mohameds Rejected Again, and Guyana's Last Independent Paper is Gone
item.description: Oil hits triple digits, the Court of Appeal delivers another blow to the Mohameds, Guyana's cash grant starts flowing to people who already have bank accounts, and we say goodbye to Stabroek News.
